recommendations.title: Don't Blink
recommendations.overview: Ten people arrive at a secluded mountain resort to find it completely deserted. With no gas for the return trip, the visitors are forced to stay and investigate the mystery surrounding the abandoned lodge.

recommendations.title: Pulse
recommendations.overview: When the dead discover a means to contact the living through electronic devices, cellphones and computers become open gateways to monstrosities and destruction.

recommendations.title: Mystery Team
recommendations.overview: A group of former Encyclopedia Brown-style child-detectives struggle to solve an adult mystery.

recommendations.title: Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Ben, a journalist from New York City, travels to West Texas in order to investigate the death of a girl he was hooking up with while recording a murder mystery podcast along the way.

recommendations.title: A Pure Formality
recommendations.overview: Famous writer Onoff is now a recluse. The Inspector is suspicious when Onoff is brought into the station one night, disoriented and suffering a kind of amnesia. In an isolated, rural police station, the Inspector tries to establish the events surroun

recommendations.title: Into the Labyrinth
recommendations.overview: When a kidnapping victim turns up alive after fifteen years, a profiler and a private investigator try to piece together the mystery.

recommendations.title: Night of the Hunted
recommendations.overview: When an unsuspecting woman stops at a remote gas station in the dead of night, she's made the plaything of a sociopath sniper with a secret vendetta. To survive, she must not only dodge his bullets and fight for her life, but also figure out who want

recommendations.title: Burn
recommendations.overview: Lonely, unstable gas station attendant Melinda is tired of being overshadowed by her more confident, outgoing co-worker Sheila. When the gas station is held up at gunpoint by Billy, a desperate man in need of quick cash, Melinda finds an opportunity

recommendations.title: L.A. Confidential
recommendations.overview: Three detectives in the corrupt and brutal L.A. police force of the 1950s use differing methods to uncover a conspiracy behind the shotgun slayings of the patrons at an all-night diner.

recommendations.title: Open 24 Hours
recommendations.overview: After setting her serial killer boyfriend on fire, a paranoid delusional woman gets a job at an all-night gas station. The isolation triggers her anxiety and hallucinations, with devastatingly gory results.
